heading: CRIMINAL PENALTIES: CORPORATIONS AND ASSOCIATIONS
operative_text: (a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), Subchapter E, Chapter 12, Penal Code, applies to offenses under this chapter committed by a corporation or association. (b) The court may not fine a corporation or association under Section 12.51(c), Penal Code, unless the amount of the fine under that subsection is greater than the amount that could be fixed by the court under Section 12.51(b), Penal Code. (c) In addition to a sentence imposed on a corporation, the court shall give notice of the conviction to the attorney general as required by Article 17A.09, Code of Criminal Procedure.
